title: lauro-cerasus pygeoides
intro: Lauro-cerasus pygeoides is a lesser-known species of cherry tree, commonly referred to as the dwarf cherry or pygeum cherry, which is a member of the Prunus genus. The medicinal properties of Lauro-cerasus pygeoides are attributed to its bark, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve prostate health, and provide antioxidant properties. Lauro-cerasus pygeoides can be prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or tablets, or used in traditional medicine to make teas and infusions.
